vulnerability.title: Enable Public Key Authentication
vulnerability.description: Enable SSH login with public keys. The default SSH configuration enables authentication based on public keys. The appropriate configuration is used if no value is set for PubkeyAuthentication. To explicitly enable Public Key Authentication, add or correct the following /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf: PubkeyAuthentication yes
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d touch /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf chmod 0600 /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf LC_ALL=C sed -i "/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id" "/etc/ssh/sshd_config" LC_ALL=C sed -i "/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id" "/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d"/*.conf if [ -e "/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf" ] ; then LC_ALL=C sed -i "/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id" "/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf" else touch "/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf" fi # make sure file has newline at the end sed -i -e '$a\' "/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf" cp "/etc/s

triage_decision.reason: Enable SSH login with public keys. The default SSH configuration enables authentication based on public keys. The appropriate configuration is used if no value is set for PubkeyAuthentication. To explicitly enable Public Key Authentication, add or correct the following /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf: PubkeyAuthentication yes
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; SSH public key authentication disabled; Potential for unauthorized access via password-based authentication

previous_attempts.scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for sshd_enable_pubkey_auth (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_sshd_enable_pubkey_auth). Could not verify.

llm_verdict.message:
\boxed{
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
rpm --quiet -q kernel-core
</parameter>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d
</parameter>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
touch /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf
</parameter>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
chmod 0600 /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf
</parameter>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
LC_ALL=C sed -i '/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id/s/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
</parameter>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>
LC_ALL=C sed -i '/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id/s/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf
</parameter>

<parameter=command>
LC_ALL=C sed -i '/^\s*PubkeyAuthentication\s\+/Id/s/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/00-complianceascode-hardening.conf
</parameter>
